programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria is furious with Liam for selling his share of the factory without consulting her, Teresa gives Jerry a sob story about her violent boyfriend, and Tony joins Underworld.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series about a city policeman transplanted to the Yorkshire Dales. A series of burglaries appear to be targeting Maggie.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series. When a gangster moves his operation into the area, Nick works undercover to investigate, assisted by his former girlfriend Jill.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: When the wife of a Brighton property developer is reported missing, Grace is plunged into a tangled investigation where everyone involved has something to hide.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part One: Banks and his team investigate the murder of the daughter of an internet entrepreneur where the prime suspect is quickly identified.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part Two: Banks still believes that Owen Pierce is the murderer after his trial collapses, but Morton aims to persuade him to keep an open mind.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Drama follow-up to the Inspector Morse series. Lewis and Hathaway launch an investigation when a middle-aged Oxford graduate is found murdered.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal at the Luxton Bus Company. Can Stan avoid the dreaded 'lurgy' before a big date.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy bus driver and his conductor pal. Stan and Jack find themselves involved in a fishy tale about a lost diamond.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal at the Luxton Bus Company. Stan is finally issued with a new uniform.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Diane seeks revenge on Rodney for portraying her as dull in his book. Viv continues to worry about her court appearance, and Pearl considers entering the quilt-making competition.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Rodney decides to throw his book away - but Nicola has other ideas. Viv asks for a mock trial to prepare her for the real thing, and Pearl and Edna continue to argue.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ashley, Claire, Sally and Kevin prepare to swap houses, Carla offers Rosie the job of becoming her personal PA, and David and Tina read the reference Audrey has written for him.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria is furious with Liam for selling his share of the factory without consulting her, Teresa gives Jerry a sob story about her violent boyfriend, and Tony joins Underworld.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Morse becomes the unwitting victim of a hate campaign in the tabloid press while investigating the murder of a well-known business tycoon at his country mansion.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series about a city policeman transplanted to the Yorkshire Dales. A series of burglaries appear to be targeting Maggie.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series. When a gangster moves his operation into the area, Nick works undercover to investigate, assisted by his former girlfriend Jill.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and acting DC Ben Jones investigate the garrotting of a husband and wife outside a deserted cottage.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Nicola tries to convince Rodney to write more stories, while David is furious to discover his girlfriend has received an advance from the publisher. Viv decides to leave.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Donna thinks she has spotted Freddie on CCTV footage and arranges a stakeout with Ross to catch him. Nicola is delighted to learn Rodney has finished another story.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tony fails to impress Carla as he steps into Liam's shoes at the factory. Michelle decides to tackle Lloyd about Steve's fidelity, while David's new employer contacts Audrey.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Michelle puts pressure on Lloyd to reveal what he and Steve got up to on their night out, Audrey is furious with Ted and David, and Tony tells Carla that he has got a master plan.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire. A woman seeks justice when her husband suffers a fatal heart attack after confronting a burglar.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in the Yorkshire Dales. Greengrass unearths an unexploded wartime bomb and the whole village has to be evacuated.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama. DCI Vera Stanhope finds herself investigating both sides of the thin blue line in order to find the killer of a brilliant young copper.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part One: Gritty detective series. When two bogus social workers come to Katy Heath's house and take her son away, Banks is drawn into a search for the boy.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part Two: Gritty detective series. An 11-year-old's body is found and Banks wonders if there is a connection between his death and Kyle's disappearance.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When an old friend of Hathaway's takes their own life, Lewis investigates a link between his death and a religious group whose members are being murdered.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal. It is the annual Busmen's Ball and the lads decide that they want something a little more exciting this year..

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy bus driver and his conductor pal. Stan decides to do some weight-training... and uses his girlfriend Doreen as the weight.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a bus company. Stan and his family decide to buy a colour TV, but there is a problem with the disposal of their old set.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Nicola tries to convince Rodney to write more stories, while David is furious to discover his girlfriend has received an advance from the publisher. Viv decides to leave.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Donna thinks she has spotted Freddie on CCTV footage and arranges a stakeout with Ross to catch him. Nicola is delighted to learn Rodney has finished another story.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tony fails to impress Carla as he steps into Liam's shoes at the factory. Michelle decides to tackle Lloyd about Steve's fidelity, while David's new employer contacts Audrey.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Michelle puts pressure on Lloyd to reveal what he and Steve got up to on their night out, Audrey is furious with Ted and David, and Tony tells Carla that he has got a master plan.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The death of an Englishwoman takes Morse and Lewis to the vineyards of Italy, a place where Morse is captivated by glamorous opera singer Nicole Burgess.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire. A woman seeks justice when her husband suffers a fatal heart attack after confronting a burglar.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in the Yorkshire Dales. Greengrass unearths an unexploded wartime bomb and the whole village has to be evacuated.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Two weddings are due to take place - Cully's to Simon, and that of local baronet Ned Fitzroy - when the maid of honour at Fitzroy's nuptials is found murdered.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: After a night on guard outside Freddie's house, Donna is torn when she realises her mum's court case will be starting shortly. Pearl is shocked to be caught red handed.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ted and Tina get Number Eight ready for a party, Lloyd warns Becky that Michelle has worked out that Steve had a one-night stand, and Ken has some art-related news for Ashley.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tina and David survey the post-party damage at Number Eight, Sally is intent on going to the police and shopping Teresa, and Jason is pleased to receive a birthday card from Becky.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series. Nick investigates a spate of burglaries, and Greengrass and Blaketon become trapped underground while searching for buried treasure.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Sitting Off the Dock of the Bay: Nostalgic police drama series. When a pirate radio station invades the airwaves, Blaketon dispatches Nick to investigate.
